name: Feast or Famine
text:
Fire role only.
Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose an opponent's character – move 1 fate from that character to a character you control.

name: Public Forum
text:
Cannot be a stronghold province.
Interrupt: When this province would be broken, if there are no honor tokens on it – place 1 honor token on it instead.

name: Kakita Yoshi
text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor – draw 3 cards. Reduce the cost of each event you play during this conflict by 2.

name: Chisei District
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
[mil] conflicts cannot be declared against this holding's province.

name: Enigmatic Magistrate
text: While this character is attacking, only characters that have an odd printed cost count their skill toward the resolution of this conflict.

name: Prodigy of the Waves
text: Action: While the [water] ring is claimed – ready this character.

name: Back-Alley Hideaway
text:
Interrupt: When a  character you control leaves play – attach that character to this holding facedown instead of placing it in its owner's discard pile.
Action: Play an attached facedown character from this holding as if it were in this province. Then, sacrifice this holding.

name: Child of the Plains
text: Reaction: After a province this character is attacking is revealed – the attacker has the first action opportunity this conflict.

name: War Dog Master
text: Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker, discard the top card of your dynasty deck – this character gets +X[mil] until the end of the conflict. X is the printed cost of the discarded card.

name: Hiruma Skirmisher
text: Reaction: After you play this character – it gains covert until the end of the phase.

name: Seal of the Crab
text: Attached character gains the  clan symbol and the Berserker trait.

name: Mantra of Water
text: Reaction: After your opponent declares a [water] conflict, choose a Monk character or a character with a Monk attachment – ready that character and draw 1 card.

name: Ageless Crone
text: During a conflict in which this character is participating, increase the cost for each player to play each event by 1.

name: Test of Courage
text: Action: During a conflict, if your honor bid is lower than your opponent's, choose a  character you control – move that character to the conflict. Then, honor it.

name: Benten's Touch
text: Action: During a conflict, bow a (friendly)  Shugenja character. Choose a participating character you control – honor that character.

name: Bayushi Kachiko
text: Action: While this character is participating in a [pol] conflict, choose a participating character with lower [pol] skill than this character – move the chosen character home. Then, you may bow it.

name: Misinformation
text: Action: During a conflict, if your honor bid is at least 2 higher than your opponent's – each participating character your opponent controls gets -1[mil] and -1[pol] until the end of the conflict.

name: Chasing the Sun
text:
Seeker role only.
Action: During a conflict in which you are the attacking player – move the contested ring to another eligible province and reveal it, if able. That province is now the attacked province.

name: Tattered Missive
text:
Attach to a Courtier character you control.
Action: Bow attached character – search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for a card, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.

name: Censure
text:
Play only if you have the Imperial Favor.
Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate – cancel those effects.
